episode_title: KT #755 - DR PHIL (ADAM RAY) + SAL VULCANO, + GREG FITZSIMMONS

1.premise: Every fact in a necrophiliac coroner's news story doubles as a pun on death, sex, or both.
Describing necrophilia as magical reframes a sexual deviance as a fantasy.

2.premise: 'Chilled' in 'Netflix and chill' has a second meaning when the partner is a corpse.

3.premise: A female necrophiliac needs rigor mortis to serve the same function as a live male partner.

4.premise: A necrophiliac's favorite movies are titles that literally describe her activity.

5.premise: 'Gang banging' applies equally to a sex act with multiple corpses and to gang violence, including the gang names Crypts and Bloods.

6.premise: 'Sexual battery' and 'shocker' are legal and colloquial terms that also describe literal electrical acts.

7.premise: Vampires can't enter without permission, making them ideal birth control partners.

lines.text: Last Christmas, a Corpus Christi coroner
lines.label: setup

lines.text: was in court for having intercourse with corpses.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And they said it was the best sex ever.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Magical even.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: "Abracadabra," if you will.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Now that's what I call Netflix and chilled.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: There's a burial plot twist.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: The offender's actually a woman.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: Thank the Lord for Rigor Mortis.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: She testified that her favorite movies are "Die Hard"
lines.label: setup

lines.text: and "Rise of the Living Dead."
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: In related news, a local drive-by shooting had 12 casualties.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That means she was down there gang banging gangbangers.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: It was crypts and blood everywhere
lines.label: tag

lines.text: with no regard for human life.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: 'Cause there wasn't any.
lines.label: tag

lines.text: She's also facing sexual battery charges, literally,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: because she had jumper cables hooked up to their nipples.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: Here's the real shocker.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: She only got caught because she got pregnant.
lines.label: punchline

lines.text: The dumbass was out there, raw dog and zombies,
lines.label: setup

lines.text: when she should have been using
lines.label: setup

lines.text: the Twilight birth control method.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: That's when you bang only vampires.
lines.label: setup

lines.text: And it works, because a vampire can't come inside
lines.label: setup

lines.text: anywhere without permission first.
lines.label: punchline
